specific_question: In the first quarter of 2025 (January 1 – March 31), how many new customers followed Lee’s Market on social media each month, and did these platforms convert those followers into sales?
answer: Sales data from January 1 to March 31, 2025 show that an average of 100 new users per month followed Lee’s Market on social media. Conversational AI chatbots engaged these users with personalized recommendations, leading to about 24% converting into completed purchases.
dr_question: How can Lee’s Market, a regional Asian supermarket chain, use conversational AI across social media, live chat, and texting to improve customer engagement and loyalty among Centennial shoppers while ensuring secure handling of customer interactions through 2026?
